plurals.name: add_cloud_items_to_shared_album_title
plurals.item: Ƙara abun cloud %d a album da aka raba?
Saka abubuwan cloud %d a album da aka raba?

plurals.name: at_least_pd_years_old_to_use_intelligent_features
plurals.item: Kana buƙatar ka zama aƙalla kana da shekara %d don amfani da siffofi na fasaha.
Kana buƙatar ka zama aƙalla kana da shekaru %d don amfani da siffofi na fasaha.

plurals.name: can_not_add_more_than_videos_meitu_post_plurals
plurals.item: Ba za a iya ƙara fiye da bidiyo %d ba zuwa sakon Meitu ba.
Ba za a iya ƙara fiye da bidiyoyi %d ba zuwa sakon Meitu ba.

plurals.name: can_not_delete_images_gdpr
plurals.item: Ba za a iya share hoto %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
Ba za a iya share hotuna %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: can_not_delete_items_gdpr
plurals.item: Ba za a iya share abu %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
Ba za a iya share abubuwa %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: can_not_delete_videos_gdpr
plurals.item: Ba za a iya share bidiyon %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
Ba za a iya share bidiyoyi %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: can_not_include_more_than_items_meitu_post_plurals
plurals.item: Ba za a iya haɗa fiye da abu %d a cikin sakon Meitu ba.
Ba za a iya haɗa fiye da abubuwa %d a cikin sakon Meitu ba.

plurals.name: can_not_restore_images_gdpr
plurals.item: Ba za a iya sake adana hoto %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
Ba za a iya sake adana hotuna %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: can_not_restore_items_gdpr
plurals.item: Ba za a iya sake adana abu %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
Ba za a iya sake adana abubuwa %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: can_not_restore_videos_gdpr
plurals.item: Ba za a iya sake adana bidiyon %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
Ba za a iya sake adana bidiyoyin %1$d %2$s ba. An kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: cant_add_more_than_n_items_at_once
plurals.item: Ba za a iya ƙara fiye da abu %d a lokaci guda ba.
Ba za a iya ƙara fiye da abubuwa %d a lokaci guda ba.

plurals.name: cant_include_more_than_n_item_in_one_story
plurals.item: Ba za a iya ƙara abu fiye da %d zuwa labari ba.
Ba za a iya ƙara abubuwa fiye da %d zuwa labari ba.

plurals.name: clear_cloud_space_for_image
plurals.item: An kasa sake adana hoto %1$d. Share wasu sarari a cikin %2$s, sannan sake gwadawa.
An kasa sake adana hotuna %1$d. Share wasu sarari a cikin %2$s, sannan sake gwadawa.

plurals.name: clear_cloud_space_for_item
plurals.item: An kasa sake adana abu %1$d. Share wasu sarari a cikin %2$s, sannan sake gwadawa.
An kasa sake adana abubuwa %1$d. Share wasu sarari a cikin %2$s, sannan sake gwadawa.

plurals.name: clear_cloud_space_for_video
plurals.item: An kasa sake adana bidiyo %1$d. Share wasu sarari a cikin %2$s, sannan sake gwadawa.
An kasa sake adana bidiyoyi %1$d. Share wasu sarari a cikin %2$s, sannan sake gwadawa.

plurals.name: cloud_not_restore_video_server
plurals.item: An kasa sake adana bidiyon %1$d. An sake adana wannan bidiyon ko an share a cikin manhajar %2$s.
An kasa sake adana bidiyoyin %1$d. An sake adana waɗannan bidiyon ko an share a cikin manhajar %2$s.

plurals.name: could_not_remove_item
plurals.item: An kasa cire abu %d. Sake gwadawa.
An kasa cire abubuwa %d. Sake gwadawa.

plurals.name: date_time_info_changed_images
plurals.item: An canza bayanin kwanan wata da lokaci a cikin hoton %d.
An canza bayanin kwanan wata da lokaci a cikin hotunan %d.

plurals.name: date_time_info_changed_items
plurals.item: An canza bayanin kwanan wata da lokaci a cikin abu %d.
An canza bayanin kwanan wata da lokaci a cikin abubuwa %d.

plurals.name: date_time_info_changed_videos
plurals.item: An canza bayanin kwanan wata da lokaci a cikin bidiyo %d.
An canza bayanin kwanan wata da lokaci a cikin bidiyoyi %d.

plurals.name: delete_group_and_albums_and_item_q
plurals.item: A share rukuni 1, album %d, da kuma abu 1 a cikin su?
A share rukuni 1, albums %d, da kuma abu 1 a cikin su?

plurals.name: delete_n_similar_photo
plurals.item: A share rukuni %d na hotuna masu kama?
A share rukunoni %d na hotuna masu kama?

plurals.name: delete_n_similar_photo_and_one
plurals.item: A share rukuni %d mai hotuna masu kama da wani abu 1?
A share rukunoni %d mai hotuna masu kama da wani abu 1?

plurals.name: delete_one_similar_photo_and_n
plurals.item: A share rukuni 1 mai hotuna masu kama da wani abu %d?
A share rukuni 1 mai hotuna masu kama da wasu abubuwa %d?

plurals.name: delete_selected_item_plural
plurals.item: A share abu %d daga wannan saitin?
A share abubuwa %d daga wannan saitin?

plurals.name: delete_selected_motion_clip_video_item_plural
plurals.item: A share yankakken bidiyo daga hoto mai motsi %d?
A goge yankakkun bidiyo daga hotuna masu motsi %d?

plurals.name: delete_selected_picture_plural
plurals.item: A share hoto %d daga wannan saitin?
A share hotuna %d daga wannan saitin?

plurals.name: drm_render_info_can_use
plurals.item: Zaka iya duba wannan ƙunshin bayanin sau %d. Duba yanzu?
Zaka iya duba wannan ƙunshin bayanin sau %d. Duba yanzu?

plurals.name: empty_albums_will_not_be_moved_to_the_trash
plurals.item: Za a share album %d da babu komai a ciki ba tare da zuwa Sharar ba.
Za a share albums %d da babu komai a ciki ba tare da zuwa Sharar ba.

plurals.name: empty_trash_description
plurals.item: Za a goge abubuwa da ke Shara dindindin bayan kwana %d.
Za a goge abubuwa da ke Shara dindindin bayan kwanaki %d.

plurals.name: go_to_one_drive_image_plural
plurals.item: Za a share hoto %d na dindindin daga wayarka. Je zuwa OneDrive don share kwafin a cikin Mazubin Fayilolin da aka Goge a can.
Za a share hotuna %d na dindindin daga wayarka. Je zuwa OneDrive don share kwafin a cikin Mazubin Fayilolin da aka Goge a can.

plurals.name: go_to_one_drive_item_plural
plurals.item: Za a share abu %d dindindin daga wayarka. Je zuwa OneDrive don share kwafin a cikin Mazubin Fayilolin da aka Goge a can.
Za a share abubuwa %d dindindin daga wayarka. Je zuwa OneDrive don share kwafin a cikin Mazubin Fayilolin da aka Goge a can.

plurals.name: go_to_one_drive_video_plural
plurals.item: Za a share bidiyo %d dindindin daga wayarka. Je zuwa OneDrive don share kwafin a cikin Mazubin Fayilolin da aka Goge a can.
Za a share bidiyoyi %d dindindin daga wayarka. Je zuwa OneDrive don share kwafin a cikin Mazubin Fayilolin da aka Goge a can.

plurals.name: grid_view_with_thumbnails_in_each_row
plurals.item: Yanayin layi tare da samfurin hoto %d a kowane jeri
Yanayin layi tare da samfurin hotuna %d a kowane jeri

plurals.name: images_restored_gdpr
plurals.item: An sake adana hotuna. Ba za a iya sake adana hoto %1$d %2$s ba saboda an kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
An sake adana hotuna. Ba za a iya sake adana hotuna %1$d %2$s ba saboda an kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: items_restored_gdpr
plurals.item: An sake adana abubuwa. Ba za a iya sake adana abu %1$d %2$s ba saboda an kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
An sake adana abubuwa. Ba za a iya sake adana abubuwa %1$d %2$s ba saboda an kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: location_info_changed_images
plurals.item: An canza bayanin wurin a cikin hoto %d.
An canza bayanin wurin a cikin hotuna %d.

plurals.name: location_info_changed_items
plurals.item: An canza bayanin wurin a cikin abu %d.
An canza bayanin wurin a cikin abubuwa %d.

plurals.name: location_info_changed_videos
plurals.item: An canza bayanin wurin a cikin bidiyon %d.
An canza bayanin wurin a cikin bidiyoyin %d.

plurals.name: more_than_limit
plurals.item: Ba za a iya shigar da fiye da harafi %d ba.
Ba za a iya shigar da fiye da harrufa %d ba.

plurals.name: motion_photo_clips_export_video_n_saved
plurals.item: An cire gajerun bidiyo daga %d hoto masu motsi da aka adana.
An cire gajerun bidiyo daga %d hotuna masu motsi da aka adana.

plurals.name: move_burst_shot_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: Matsar da hoton da ke batsawe %d zuwa Shara?
Matsar da hotunan da ke batsawe %d zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_burst_shot_to_the_trash_plural_m_trans
plurals.item: Matsar da hoton da ke batsawe %d zuwa Shara?
Matsar da hotunan da ke batsawe %d zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_group_and_album_and_items_to_the_trash_q
plurals.item: A matsar da rukuni 1, album 1, da kuma abu %d da ke cikin su zuwa Shara?
A matsar da rukuni 1, album 1, da kuma abubuwa %d da ke cikin su zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_group_and_albums_and_item_to_the_trash_q
plurals.item: A matsar da rukuni 1, album %d, da kuma abu 1 da ke cikin su zuwa Shara?
A matsar da rukuni 1, albums %d, da kuma abu 1 da ke cikin su zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_groups_and_album_and_item_to_the_trash_q
plurals.item: A matsar da rukuni %d, album 1, da kuma abu 1 da ke cikin su zuwa Shara?
A matsar da rukunoni %d, album 1, da kuma abu 1 da ke cikin su zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_image_in_burst_shot_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: Matsar da hoto %d daga wannan hoton da ke batsewa zuwa Shara?
Matsar da hotuna %d daga wannan hoton da ke batsewa zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_image_in_burst_shot_to_the_trash_plural_m_trans
plurals.item: Matsar da hoto %d daga wannan hoton da ke batsewa zuwa Shara?
Matsar da hotuna %d daga wannan hoton da ke batsewa zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_images_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: A matsar da hoto %d zuwa Shara?
A matsar da hotuna %d zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_items_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: A matsar da abu %d zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_n_similar_photo
plurals.item: Matsar da rukunin %d na hotuna masu kama zuwa Shara?
Matsar da rukunonin %d na hotuna masu kama zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_n_similar_photo_and_one
plurals.item: A matsar da rukuni %d na hotuna masu kama da wani abu 1 zuwa Shara?
A matsar da rukunoni %d na hotuna masu kama da wani abu 1 zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_one_similar_photo_and_n
plurals.item: A matsar da rukuni 1 na hotuna masu kama da wani abu %d zuwa Shara?
A matsar da rukuni 1 na hotuna masu kama da wasu abubuwa %d zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_selected_item_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: Matsar da abu %d daga wannan saitin zuwa Shara?
Matsar da abubuwa %d daga wannan saitin zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_selected_picture_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: Matsar da hoto %d daga wannan saitin zuwa Shara?
Matsar da hotuna %d daga wannan saitin zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_single_taken_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: Matsar da saitin %d ɗauka Guda zuwa Shara?
Matsar da saiti %d ɗauka Guda zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: move_to_private_album_q
plurals.item: Matsar da abun %d albam na sirri?
Matsar da abun %d albam na sirri?

plurals.name: move_to_sync_off_album_cloud_file
plurals.item: An kasa matsar da fayil na %1$d %2$s zuwa %3$s. Sauke wannan fayil ɗin, sannan sake gwadawa.
An kasa matsar da fayilolin %1$d %2$s zuwa %3$s. Sauke waɗannan fayiloli, sannan sake gwadawa.

plurals.name: move_videos_to_the_trash_plural
plurals.item: A matsar da bidiyo %d zuwa Shara?
A matsar da bidiyoyi %d zuwa Shara?

plurals.name: moving_items_to_the_trash
plurals.item: Ana matsar da abu %d zuwa Shara…
Ana matsar da abubuwa %d zuwa Shara…

plurals.name: n_albums_have_been_merged_here
plurals.item: An haɗe album %d mai suna iri ɗaya.
An haɗe album %d masu suna iri ɗaya.

plurals.name: n_days_until_story_is_deleted
plurals.item: Saura kwana %d kafin a goge labari
Saura kwana %d kafin a goge labari

plurals.name: n_images_added_to_favorites
plurals.item: An ƙara hoto %d zuwa waɗanda aka fi so.
An ƙara hotuna %d zuwa waɗanda aka fi so.

plurals.name: n_items_added_to_favorites
plurals.item: An ƙara abu %d zuwa waɗanda aka fi so.
An ƙara abubuwa %d zuwa waɗanda aka fi so.

plurals.name: n_suggested_pictures_on_family_album
plurals.item: Mun samu sabon hoto %d da zaka iya son askawa a wannan album ɗin.
Mun samu sabon hotuna %d da zaka iya son sakawa a wannan album ɗin.

plurals.name: n_videos_added_to_favorites
plurals.item: An ƙara bidiyo %d zuwa waɗanda aka fi so.
An ƙara bidiyoyi %d zuwa waɗanda aka fi so.

plurals.name: number_of_downloaded_contents
plurals.item: An sauke abu %d. Danna nan don ganin shi.
An sauke abubuwa %d. Danna nan don ganin su.

plurals.name: number_of_heif_contents_to_download_on_phone
plurals.item: An kasa sauke fayil na %d. Hotunan HEIF basa aiki a wannan wayar.
An kasa sauke fayilolin %d. Hotunan HEIF basa aiki a wannan wayar.

plurals.name: number_of_heif_contents_to_download_on_tablet
plurals.item: An kasa sauke fayil na %d. Hotunan HEIF basa aiki a wannan tabulet ɗin.
An kasa sauke fayilolin %d. Hotunan HEIF basa aiki a wannan tabulet ɗin.

plurals.name: object_capture_toast_could_not_add_more_than_n_stickers
plurals.item: Ba za a iya ƙara fiye da sitika %d ba. Je zuwa editan hoton a cikin Manhajar ajiye hotuna don cire sitiku.
Ba za a iya ƙara fiye da sitiku %d ba. Je zuwa editan hoton a cikin Manhajar ajiye hotuna don cire sitiku.

plurals.name: remove_images_from_shared_album_plural
plurals.item: A cire hoto %d daga wannan album da aka raba?
A cire hotuna %d daga wannan album da aka raba?

plurals.name: remove_n_suggested_images_from_suggestion
plurals.item: A cire hoto %d daga shawarwarin album ɗinka?
A cire hotuna %d daga shawarwarin album ɗinka?

plurals.name: remove_n_suggested_items_from_suggestion
plurals.item: A cire abu %d daga shawarwarin album ɗinka?
A cire abubuwa %d daga shawarwarin album ɗinka?

plurals.name: remove_n_suggested_videos_from_suggestion
plurals.item: A cire bidiyo %d daga shawarwarin album ɗinka?
A cire bidiyoyi %d daga shawarwarin album ɗinka?

plurals.name: remove_videos_from_shared_album_plural
plurals.item: A cire bidiyo %d daga wannan album da aka raba?
A cire bidiyoyi %d daga wannan album da aka raba?

plurals.name: unname_year_ago
plurals.item: Wannan mutumin %d shekara da suka wuce
Wannan mutumin shekaru %d da suka wuce

plurals.name: videos_restored_gdpr
plurals.item: An sake adana bidiyo. Ba za a iya sake adana bidiyon %1$d %2$s ba saboda an kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.
An sake adana bidiyo. Ba za a iya sake adana bidiyoyin %1$d %2$s ba saboda an kulle %3$s ɗinka saboda buƙatar keɓaɓɓen bayanai.

plurals.name: vidoe_collage_maker_max_size_reached
plurals.item: An kasa saka fiye da %d abu a cikin koleji.
An kasa saka fiye da %d abubuwa a cikin koleji.
